title: Unlimited Enchantments
description: Enchantments now have no limit on levels!
body:
# ✨ Unlimited Enchantments ✨

![Unlimited lvl enchantment](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22669fe3c62d84a533fe2eaffada81185d830293.png)

## 🚀 Key Features

- **📊 Maximum Level:** 255 (instead of the standard game limits)
- **🔍 Easy Search:** Type the enchantment name in the search bar — you'll see all available levels from 1 to 255
- **🎨 Creative Mode Ingredients Tab** now displays enchantments up to level 255

---

## 📦 Where to Find Enchantments?

> **Important:** Enchantments exceeding the standard limit cannot be created through normal methods.  
> They can only be obtained by:
> - 🏛️ Finding them in structures (chests, dungeons, loot)
> - 🏘️ Buying them from villagers (librarians)

---

## ⚠️ Known Limitation

When trying to combine two books with high enchantment levels, you may encounter an error:  
> **"Too Expensive!"** — the experience cost required for combining exceeds the allowable limit.

### 🛠️ If you know how to fix this:
We'd appreciate your contribution!  
👉 Submit your solutions to our [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/SayNooty/Unlimited-Enchantments)

---

**✨ Enjoy the game with unlimited possibilities!**
